zh.Eastwell Manor, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Moyle於1370年出生在英國可瓦爾博德明時，他的父親William Moyle43歲，母親Amy Langston20歲。他於1403年與Lady Isabelle Knollys在英國肯特爾哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1399年被列為lord mayor of london。他去世於1445年2月8日在英國肯特爾哈姆享年75歲。

zh-hans.Eastwell Manor, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Moyle于1370年出生在英国可瓦爾博德明时，他的父亲William Moyle43岁，母亲Amy Langston20岁。他于1403年与Lady Isabelle Knollys在英国肯特爾哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1399年被列为lord mayor of london。他去世于1445年2月8日在英国肯特爾哈姆享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: probably a nickname from Middle Cornish mōl ‘bald’, though its development to Moyl(e) is irregular.
Welsh: nickname from moel ‘bare, bald’, equivalent to Middle Cornish mōl (see 1 above).
English: variant of   Mule   or   Moule  .

variants.name: Mule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Matteo, Sal, Carmelo, Concetta, Francesco, Gaetano, Gaspare, Gino, Rosario.
English: nickname, perhaps for a stubborn person, from Middle English mule, muel, meul, moile ‘mule’ (Old French mule). See also Moyle and Moule , with which this name may have been interchangeable.

variants.name: Milne
meanings: Scottish (mainly Aberdeenshire and Angus): occupational name from Middle English milne ‘mill’, also found as mulne in south and western England and melne in southeastern England. The Scottish name has been established in Ireland since the early 18th century, and has absorbed some cases of Irish Moyle . Compare Mill 1.

variants.name: Moyles
meanings: English: variant of Moyle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
English: in Devon and Cornwall probably a variant of   Mullis  .
Irish (Mayo and Meath): variant of   Miles  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Moyle was born in 1370, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, his father, William Moyle, was 43 and his mother, Amy Langston, was 20. He married Lady Isabelle Knollys in 1403, in Chilham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1399, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as lord mayor of london. He died on 8 February 1445, in Chilham, Kent, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Moyle est né en 1370, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William Moyle, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Amy Langston, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabelle Knollys en 1403, à Chilham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1399, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord mayor of london. Il est décédé le 8 février 1445, à Chilham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Moyle 1370 in Bodmin, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Moyle 43 und seine Mutter Amy Langston 20. Er hat 1403 in Chilham, Kent, England Lady Isabelle Knollys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1399, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord mayor of london aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. Februar 1445 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Chilham, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Moyle è nato il nel 1370 nel Bodmin, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, William Moyle, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Amy Langston, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabelle Knollys nel 1403, nel Chilham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1399, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord mayor of london. Morì il 8 febbraio 1445, nel Chilham, Kent, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Bodmin, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルボドミン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Moyleが1370年にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで生まれた時，父William Moyleは43歳，母Amy Langstonは20歳であった。1403年にイギリスケントチルハムでLady Isabelle Knollysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1399年，29歳の時，職業はlord mayor of londonと記録されている。彼は1445年2月8日にイギリスケントチルハムで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Moyle(이)가 1370년 영국 코른월 보드민에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Moyle(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy Langston(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 켄트 치함에서 Lady Isabelle Knollys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1399년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord mayor of london이었다. 그는 1445년 2월 8일 영국 켄트 치함에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Eastwell Manor, Kent, England: Eastwell, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Moyle nasceu em 1370, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Moyle, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Amy Langston, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabelle Knollys em 1403, em Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1399, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord mayor of london. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1445, em Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Moyle родился в 1370 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени William Moyle было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Amy Langston, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabelle Knollys в 1403 г. в местности чилхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1399 году, в возрасте 29 лет,  он работал по профессии lord mayor of london. Он умер 8 февраля 1445 г. в местности чилхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Moyle nació en 1370, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, William Moyle, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Amy Langston, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Isabelle Knollys en 1403, en Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1399, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era lord mayor of london. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1445, en Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
